name: okr-core
displayName: OKR Core — Business OKR Project Manager
description: A facilitator-and-documenter Project Manager for Claude Code that runs a human team through an adapted 5-phase OKR loop (Discuss → Plan → Execute → Verify → Ship). Enforces OKR best practices, tracks Objectives, Key Results, and Initiatives in durable STATE.md / CONTEXT.md artifacts.
